data.acceptance:
1. terminateProcessGroup signature accepts an optional reason parameter: terminateProcessGroup(child, reasonOrDelayMs?, delayMs?) OR a new options object. Backward-compatible default OK.
2. At entry, console.warn emits tag [terminal-manager] [terminate-process-group] with pid and reason.
3. All existing call sites in the repo are updated to pass a meaningful reason: 'watchdog_timeout', 'external_abort', 'connection_reset', etc.
4. The SIGKILL setTimeout branch also logs when it fires with pid and signal=SIGKILL.
5. All lint/typecheck/test/build pass.
